title: Split receipt into two categories
objective: Verify that a split receipt is saved as two linked rows and grouped in the timeline

steps.step: Open Fast Entry, enter total amount = 100, select Account = 'Cash'
steps.expected_result: Entry screen shows total = 100, one line

steps.step: Add a split line: amount = 80, Category = 'Food'
Add a second split line: amount = 20, Category = 'Consumables'

steps.expected_result: Sheet closes. Timeline shows a receipt group with two child lines (Food: 80, Consumables: 20)

steps.step: Query database directly (or via debug screen)
steps.expected_result: Two TransactionEntity rows exist, both sharing the same non-null receipt_group_id
